DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-17-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Yaron F. Dunkel of CARPENTER, ROTHANS & DUMONT (213-228-0400), appearing via CourtCall for defendant and moving party California Water Service Company.
Kimberly J. Chu of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing via CourtCall for plaintiff and opposing party Michael O. Walker.

RULING:
Hearing held, argued and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant California Water Service Company's Demurrer to Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint is off calendar for failure to lodge courtesy copies with the Court. (Local Rule 2.7B.) Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-18-276696 WITH CASE CGC-21-276915
Off Calendar Jun-17-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Kimberly J. Chu of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing via CourtCall for plaintiff and moving party Michael O. Walker.
Yaron F. Dunkel of CARPENTER, ROTHANS & DUMONT (213-228-0400), appearing via CourtCall for defendant and moving party California Water Service Company.
Jon C. James of HUGO & PARKER (415-808-0300), appearing via CourtCall for Central Valley Supply.
Thomas Steig of PRINDLE, GOETZ, BARNES & REINHOLTZ, LLP (415-788-8354), appearing via CourtCall for defendant Chevron Entities.

Matter heard simultaneously with CGC-18-276696

RULING:
Hearing held, argued and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's Motion for Order Consolidating Actions for All Purposes Including Trial and Adding Consolidated Cases to the October 21, 2021 Trial Setting Conference is GRANTED under Code of Civil Procedure section 1048(a). The Court did not consider the opposition filed by Specially Appearing California Water Service Company for failure to lodge courtesy copies with the Court. (Local Rule 2.7B.) Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)

Kimberly J. Chu of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing via CourtCall for plaintiff and opposing party Michael O. Walker.
